race.comment: DANCE GAVIN DANCE (7) lightly raced gelding adept in all conditions. Went forward when he made it two straight wins with a convincing victory over 1015m at this track. Maps well and ploughed through the heavy going here two-back. Respect. SPIRIT OF BRODIE (6) has been racing well and can turn the tables here fourth-up. Closed quickly on the back-up with a tough third over 1200m at the Gold Coast. Goes well at this distance range and expect to see him a little closer in the run today. Top-three contender. MARATHIA (11) consistent mare drawn out again for this. Cruised across from the wide gate and never gave up with a gritty fifth over 1200m at the Gold Coast. Will appreciate the claim. Each way. THE LUCKY ALIEN (4) ran a strong race first up at Ipswich, then went to town and pulled up with a slow post-race recovery when seventh over 1000m at Eagle Farm. Can bounce back quickly.
